content: Nudge mechanism uses pending marker files (.overstory/pending-nudges/{agent}.json) instead of tmux keys. Mail types auto-trigger nudge: worker_done, merge_ready, error, escalation, merge_failed OR priority=urgent/high. Marker cleared on next mail check --inject, prepending priority banner to injected output.

Mail claim/ack pattern uses at-most-once delivery semantics: check() atomically claims + acks in single call, causing message loss if process crashes after ack but before processing. For at-least-once semantics, use claim() + ack() per-message instead.

description: mail-check-state.json uses read-modify-write pattern without atomic guarantee: concurrent agents calling 'ov mail check --debounce' can cause lost updates where one agent's timestamp is overwritten.
resolution: Migrate to SQLite table in mail.db with atomic INSERT OR UPDATE operation for recordMailCheck() and isMailCheckDebounced().

name: SQLite claim/ack state machine
description: All claim/ack/nack operations in src/mail/store.ts wrapped in db.transaction() for ACID guarantees. Claim atomically: (1) expires stale leases, (2) promotes retryable fails, (3) selects+claims available messages. State guards (WHERE state IN (...)) provide defense-in-depth against invalid transitions.
